name: arena
description: Orchestrate codex / gemini CLIs in dual paradigms — COMPETE (multi-variant compare) or COLLABORATE (decompose and integrate). Supports Solo/Team/Quick execution modes.
tagline: Best outcome through competition or collaboration.

capabilities.summary: Solo sequential, Team parallel via Agent Teams API, Quick lightweight
Git branch isolation and weighted comparative evaluation
codex review for quality/safety, hybrid selection
codex (192K, sandbox) and gemini (1M, Deep Think, Search grounding)
Cross-session learning via Arena Effectiveness Score
